subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: How Provinces Began
objective: Ihiwalay ang tala, oral history, alamat, at di-beripikadong pahayag sa kathang-isip na pinagmulan.
introduction: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “How Provinces Began”.
A key word used in the lesson “How Provinces Began”.
A key word used in the lesson “How Provinces Began”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

doesNotFit: Tiyak na claim mula sa isang hula

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

activities.instruction: Alin ang dapat malinaw na lagyan ng label bilang kuwento o alamat?

feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. dated official record and map scale do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “How Provinces Began”?

options.text: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.
The correct response is “dated record” because it follows the lesson explanation: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Imbentong kuwento bilang fact” because it follows the lesson explanation: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.

items.prompt: Alin ang dapat malinaw na lagyan ng label bilang kuwento o alamat?
items.explanation: The correct response is “legend” because it follows the lesson explanation: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?

options.text: Tiyak na claim mula sa isang hula

items.explanation: The correct response is “legend na malinaw ang label” because it follows the lesson explanation: Magkaiba ang uri ng ebidensya; ang alamat ay hindi awtomatikong tiyak na kasaysayan.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for How Provinces Began; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in How Provinces Began.
